data.body:
SESSION SUMMARY — plan-review/completion gate hardening (started from /rebar-debug 790c).

LANDED to main (Gerrit, RebarBotNava):
- 790c: plan-review sign-review invalidates on dependency material change (matches sign_manifest); msg names own-vs-dependency; docs prescribe dependency-graph-order review. MERGED+closed.
- 80af: `transition ... closed --ref <commit>` targets the completion close gate at a commit (default HEAD); drift guard resolves same ref so stacked story closes SIGNED; removed CLI help byte-parity change-detector (333 goldens -> live tests). MERGED+closed.
- ad9f: single best-effort store-mount gate before intercepts+dispatch so no command (incl. verify-commit-ticket) skips the mount. MERGED+closed.
- 4de6 (change 934): default completion close resolves HEAD to one immutable sha at entry + threads it -> concurrent commit can't split verify from sign. Follow-up 937: residual unsigned-close warning names a WORKING recovery (reopen->re-close --ref). Both MERGED; ticket close pending.
- e458 (change 940 IN REVIEW): completion-verifier prompt now says search_files is LITERAL substring (not regex), locate tests by ticket-id/symbol + list_directory; temperature pinned 0; sidecar records verified_at_sha+trace_id. /rebar-debug root cause: NOT structural/NOT --ref/NOT primarily temperature — agent's fallible free-form search silently no-matches on regex/semantic queries (full evidence in e458 comments).

FILED: idea 4217 (invocation-wide resolve-once-thread-the-sha rev-pinning pattern).

HANDOFF: close e458 after 940 merges (ff worktree first); 4de6 code fully merged (934+937), close after 940 lands (verifier reliable) or via evidence comment. Retire debug worktrees rebar-{debug-790c,debug-80af,mount,4de6,e458}.

GOTCHAS: bare `rebar` = global (can lag) — activate a worktree .venv for local code. rebar LLM key = ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from the Claude Code process env (NOT .zshrc). Closing a claimed task needs an EXECUTION-phase attestation (review-plan --force). CI drift gates: regen docs/cli-reference.md + CLI help goldens after CLI-surface changes; reviewers/index.json is front-matter-derived.
